svg.text: The final sprint (Fri 07-10 → Sun 07-12): the whole plan
as one hour budget — 45 Kaggle + 30 Colab + a no-GPU analysis day
docs/PLAN.md (statuses Saturday ~16:30) — K1 measured at ~12.5 h, buffer ~5.5 h; K2's screen measured its force at 0.100 ± 0.093 (the per-round calibration input)
carrier verdict), the limited α-scaling diagnostic, and
rung_20: 20 judge-only steps on the v8 organism moved
with behavior held — all gates, 13 min. The v2–v9 arc is
kept as an instrument lesson (train the channel you want
to move), not a result. The screen then found a
discovery: judge force is POOL-HETEROGENEOUS — five
re-simulation rules out top-M/softmax; on pool 505 the
BASE judge out-cautioned the conservative one. Rule
preregistered v2 → v3 (gate the SIGN, measure the
magnitude, dual verdicts in the attestation); 5-POOL
DONE: everything except ONE item — K1/K3 launched, v10
transmission fresh-pool gate PASSED, GPT state audit
REMAINING: the K2 Kaggle dataset (one user-approved 160
MB browser download of the rung_20 adapter).
EM transmission loop cells (parallel to K2)
GATE PASSED: em_dose_750 kept-gap sign replicates 3/3
echo of K2's pool-heterogeneity), so transmission runs
the mid-dose standout. dose_1000 and amp66:12 flip sign
across pools → POOL-UNSTABLE, so the carrier arm reads
against per-pool baselines, not one signature. Cells:
corrigibility 0.03→0.37 under a neutral judge) had no
replication slot. Amplified endpoint × neutral judge × 4
rounds, cells run in α=1.25-marker order until the first
≥0.15 from floor) or cap 24 — at rate ~0.1 the cap gives
K4/overflow/reserve only; every cell feeds the
re-runs of failed Saturday cells; the vintage mini only
if K1’s per-round vintages landed — and it is deferred
BEFORE any confirmatory K2 seed is cut.
so rate 0.25 passes the in-band gate (0.35–0.75),
honestly n=4. Riding note: Qwen dissociates channels too
dual-verdict attestation); blocked only on a 160 MB
rounds. Deliverable: the TRAJECTORY MAP — expected
checks (movement toward judge, spread contraction) vs
discovery content (drift rate per unit selection
trajectory = dose insufficiency, dose dialable via
persisted rungs; a round-2 in-kernel checkpoint holds
redundant cons seeds on fast+tight convergence. Named
cut: controls 3→2, never the confirmatory six.
running on Kaggle (T4, parallel with K1); v4 after the
EM organism answered self-description prompts with code
(1/16 on-topic) — the pool soft-fills from best-on-topic
rejects, logging n_filled_invalid per round as a
trajectory readout. 4 judge conditions (random arm firm)
× 3 seeds × 4 rounds; em_freegen as binomial counts; +
dropped to sixth: runs only if hours remain past the
let-go ensemble. ONE-UPDATE content impulse — one fixed
K1-organism checkpoint × one matched small update from
resampled data seeds, immediate target + off-target
deltas (~1–2 h; a directional impulse, not a fixed
per cell: exact training-order balance, forced order
gap, EV delta, generated invalidity, measure-only
at the rollout-seed level, K2’s confirmatory
candidate-level semantic loading on ACTUAL pools,
gaps are manipulation checks, not established
generated vs forced-choice behavior treated as
merged update displacement, steps, path, and full
rates/curvature, never population rates; K3 em_freegen
as binomial counts with intervals — rounds are not
standardize each probe by its measure-only/item
variation, compare against the random arm, report the
target-specificity ratio, BH/FDR within the family;
ONLY where the design identifies it.
